name: **E-book Enthusiast**
definition: Purchases multiple e-books (often in bulk or across genres) with minimal other products.

name: **Fitness Enthusiast**
definition: Buys fitness gear (dumbbells, yoga mats, sneakers) and apparel for workouts.

name: **Beauty & Skincare Enthusiast**
definition: Purchases 2+ beauty items (lipsticks, moisturizers, serums, shampoos).

name: **Apparel & Footwear Buyer**
definition: Buys clothing (hoodies, jeans, sneakers, dresses) and accessories.

name: **Home Appliance Shopper**
definition: Purchases kitchen or cleaning appliances (air fryers, vacuums, blenders).

name: **Bookworm**
definition: Frequently buys e-books, hardcovers, or paperbacks (often in bulk).

name: **Gadget & Tech User**
definition: Purchases electronics (monitors, mice, keyboards, webcams) for upgrades.

name: **Kid-Focused Shopper**
definition: Buys toys (dolls, action figures, building blocks) for children.

name: **Repetitive Purchaser**
definition: Repurchases the same product (e.g., sneakers, moisturizers, water bottles).

name: **Puzzle & Game Enthusiast**
definition: Purchases puzzles, board games, or building blocks.

name: **Single-Item Shopper**
definition: Focuses on one unique product per transaction (e.g., SSD, hoodie, lamp).

name: **Skincare & Haircare User**
definition: Buys sunscreens, shampoos, serums, or conditioners.

name: **Diverse General Shopper**
definition: Purchases 3–6+ unique items across unrelated categories.

name: **Lipstick Collector**
definition: Buys multiple lipsticks in different shades (often with beauty items).

name: **Frequent Repurchaser (Skincare/Apparel)**
definition: Repeats purchases of specific items (e.g., jeans, sneakers, serums).

name: **Color-Specific Collector**
definition: Purchases items (apparel, toys, books) in varied or consistent colors.

name: **Outdoor & Casual Gear Buyer**
definition: Buys water bottles, cycling helmets, or tennis rackets.

name: **Miscellaneous Shopper**
definition: Buys unrelated products without clear patterns.

name: **Health & Wellness Seeker**
definition: Purchases fitness gear, water bottles, or sunscreen.

name: **Frequent Toy Buyer**
definition: Buys 2+ children’s toys (action figures, dolls, building blocks).
